title: [kimi-review] 7f46d18: [SEVERITY: medium] **Flag checked at wrong granularity** — I
description:
Commit: 7f46d1898
Message: fix(kiss): stop RX thread in deinit with shutdown flag

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] **Flag checked at wrong granularity** — If the flag is only checked once per loop iteration but the loop contains multiple blocking or long operations, shutdown latency or races remain.
close_reason: Improved shutdown flag granularity in kiss_rx_thread_fn: added checks in drain while, byte for-loop (stops promptly even during large RX buffers or multiple frames). Updated deinit join/abort path. Eliminates latency/race per kimi-review. No comments added. Commit c3cef809c.
